bomber-gear.name: Bomber Gear
bomber-gear.description: A special combat tool for placing bomber bombs.
remote-bomb-chip.name: Remote Bomb Chip
remote-bomb-chip.description: A socket chip that grants remote detonation to bomber bombs.
pierce-bomb-chip.name: Pierce Bomb Chip
pierce-bomb-chip.description: A socket chip that grants piercing power to bomber bombs.
kick-chip.name: Kick Chip
kick-chip.description: A socket chip that lets you kick placed bombs.
throw-chip.name: Throw Chip
throw-chip.description: A socket chip that lets you lift and throw bombs.
power-core.name: Power Core
power-core.description: A socket core that increases bomb power by 1.
bomb-bag.name: Bomb Bag
bomb-bag.description: A socket module that increases max placed bombs by 1.
